assertions.assertion: Explains that IProfileService.GetProfileDataAsync receives ProfileDataRequestContext with RequestedClaimTypes
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md 'ProfileDataRequestContext Key Members' table lists `RequestedClaimTypes` — 'Claim types requested by the client via scopes/resources'

assertions.assertion: Explains that AddRequestedClaims filters to only emit claims whose type is in RequestedClaimTypes
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md states `AddRequestedClaims(IEnumerable<Claim>)` — 'Helper that filters your claims to only those in RequestedClaimTypes'

assertions.assertion: Shows how to declare UserClaims on an ApiScope or ApiResource to include them in the requested types
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md 'Claims Not Appearing in Tokens' pitfall and Resource-Based Claim Filtering section both show UserClaims on ApiScope/ApiResource

assertions.assertion: Does NOT require sub-documents — this is answered entirely from the core SKILL.md
assertions.rationale: All information needed is in the core SKILL.md — IProfileService section, Common Pitfalls, and Resource-Based Claim Filtering
